Project Context: I own a study abroad agency (www.estudiaenirlanda.com). Currently, my website is hosted on Wix (approx. 80 pages). I am migrating my entire operation (CRM and Web) to GoHighLevel (GHL). IMPORTANT: I do NOT need you to migrate the 80 pages. I will handle the manual content migration myself. I only need you to build the visual foundation. Scope of Work: I need you to analyze my current Wix site and design 6 to 8 master templates directly in the website builder of my GoHighLevel sub-account. I am not looking for a boring 1:1 copy; I want you to take my current information/images and transform them into modern, clean, and highly conversion-optimized templates (lead generation). Deliverables: Master Templates: Home, Destination Page, Program/Course Page, Blog (Archive and Single Post), and Contact/Booking Page. Global Sections: The Header (navigation menu) and Footer must be configured as Global Sections so they update site-wide when I clone the pages. Mobile Optimization (Mandatory): Templates must look perfect and load fast on mobile devices. Native Forms: Integrate native GHL forms into the templates mapping the fields we use (Name, Email, Phone, Program of Interest, Travel Date). Requirements: Native Spanish Speaker (Mandatory): The website content is entirely in Spanish, so you must understand the language to avoid formatting or spelling errors. Verifiable portfolio of websites or funnels built in GoHighLevel. Budget & Workflow: The fixed budget for this project is $150 USD. Payment will be released in full once the 6-8 master templates are approved and tested on both desktop and mobile. If you read this and can deliver an amazing design, please start your proposal with the phrase: "GHL Ireland Listo".

Web Design
Landing Page
Lead Generation
Spanish

I'm building a fully automated B2B sales workflow. Looking for someone with real hands-on experience (not just theory) to architect and build this system in three phases. Phase 1 Gmail inbound → Zapier trigger → AI classification (inquiry / follow-up ) → create contact & task in Pipedrive or Close CRM → AI-drafted reply in Gmail drafts → auto follow-up reminder if no reply in 3–7 days Phase 2 Detect client reply → advance CRM deal stage → trigger quote email template with client details auto-filled Phase 3 Deal won → sync to Airtable or Notion → auto-generate invoice template → monthly summary report exported automatically Hard requirements: Must have built Zapier workflows with AI steps (OpenAI or Anthropic) Must have configured Pipedrive or Close CRM from scratch Must provide a real portfolio example of a similar sales automation Bilingual English + Mandarin is a strong plus Deliverables for each phase: Working Zaps (not just screenshots) Written documentation (how each step works, how to edit it) 1 round of revisions 30-min handover call To apply, please answer: What's one sales automation you've built? What tools did you use? How would you handle AI misclassifying an email? Have you used Pipedrive AND Close? What's your preference and why? Candidates who don't answer these questions will not be reviewed.

title: Zapier + Klaviyo Automation Specialist — n8n & GoHighLevel Integration Build
query: n8n Make Zapier automation fixed price
chunk:

Zapier + Klaviyo Automation Specialist — n8n & GoHighLevel Integration Build
Job Feedback
Save Job

Payment verified
Rating is 0 out of 5.
0
$0
spent
Location
Spain
Fixed price
Expert
Est. budget:
$100.00

We're a gestoría in Spain handling tax filings, business registrations, payroll, and ongoing compliance. Our lead intake runs through GoHighLevel and that part is solid. The bottleneck is the Zapier layer connecting everything downstream. We've built Zaps over time without proper architecture and now we have a dozen brittle integrations that nobody on our team can debug when one breaks. What we need built. Rebuild the Zapier infrastructure as a clean, idempotent layer that handles the bulk of our integrations cleanly. Each Zap needs proper trigger filters, dedup logic, error routes, and naming conventions so a non-technical operator can follow what's happening. Replace the spaghetti with structured multi-step Zaps using Filters, Paths, Formatter, and lookup tables. Where Zapier handles it cleanly, keep it in Zapier. Where the conditional logic gets too complex for Zapier's flat structure, migrate the workflow to n8n. We want the right tool for the right job, not everything forced into one platform. Specifically, we need Zapier handling. New GHL contact triggers Zap that filters by service type, routes to the right downstream chain, and updates Klaviyo with proper tags and properties for segmentation. Document signing tool fires Zap into Klaviyo and our invoicing platform. Calendar bookings fire Zap that updates the client record and notifies the right specialist. Form submissions from external sources route through Zapier to the correct internal queue based on service type and language. Klaviyo becomes the marketing email layer. We want every client synced into Klaviyo with the right tags (service type, business size, language) so we can run targeted broadcasts (tax season reminders, regulatory updates, new service launches) instead of generic blasts. Klaviyo segmentation needs to be queryable, not guessed. n8n handles only the workflows where Zapier hits its ceiling. Multi-branch logic with several conditional nodes, webhook handlers that need custom payload manipulation, anything that requires looping or state management Zapier can't do natively. We want n8n used surgically, not as a default. Airtable holds the structured client data with linked tables, and Zapier syncs it both ways with the rest of the stack. Documentation m

Job Description: We are looking for an experienced freelancer who is an expert in WhatsApp Business API, Meta Business Manager, Facebook Developer Apps, and business account verification to help us integrate WhatsApp into our AI agent platform. Our platform helps companies engage with customers, qualify leads, answer questions, and book meetings using AI agents. We want customers to be able to connect their WhatsApp Business accounts inside our portal and allow our AI agents to respond to customer messages through WhatsApp. The ideal freelancer should have hands-on experience setting up the WhatsApp Business API, troubleshooting Meta/Facebook Business verification issues, configuring webhooks, managing phone number verification, and handling the full integration process from setup to testing. Current Situation Our Meta Business Portfolio keeps getting restricted every time we set one up. Part of this project involves resolving the restriction and completing Business Verification. Applicants must have hands-on experience resolving Meta business restrictions, verification rejections, and account flags — not just clean greenfield setups. Responsibilities The freelancer will help us: Integrate WhatsApp Business API into our AI agent platform. Allow customers to connect their own WhatsApp Business accounts from inside our portal. Set up and configure Meta Business Manager, Meta Developer App, WhatsApp Business Account, phone numbers, and webhooks. Troubleshoot Facebook/Meta business verification issues. Troubleshoot SMS and phone number verification issues. Configure permissions, access tokens, app review requirements, and webhook subscriptions. Help design the customer onboarding flow for WhatsApp integration. Test inbound and outbound WhatsApp messages. Ensure AI agents can receive WhatsApp messages and respond properly. Document the full setup process for our internal engineering team. Advise us on best practices for scaling WhatsApp integrations across multiple customers. Required Experience You must have experience with: WhatsApp Embedded Signup (Facebook Login for Business) — specifically the Embedded Signup flow, not just direct Cloud API for a single number WhatsApp Business Platform / WhatsApp Cloud A

We are a Home Services company looking to deploy a high-performance AI Voice Agent to handle inbound leads and outbound follow-ups. We are using Retail AI (2026 Edition) as our voice platform and GoHighLevel as our CRM. We're looking for a specialist that cab build an agent where every call interaction—from handling complex objections to scheduling—is captured and synchronized within our CRM without manual entry. Scope of Work Voice Agent Development: Configure a professional, low-latency agent in Retail AI using the Ultravox prompting framework.Script Logic Implementation: Program the agent to follow a strict multi-stage call flow, including: Intro & Verification: Quickly confirming the homeowner's identity and address. Need Uncovering: Identifying pain points such as outdated fixtures, mold, or structural issues. Value of Visit (V.O.V): Selling the benefit of a free, "down to the penny" written quote for planning and budgeting. Complex Objection Handling: Navigating "not now" budget stalls, manufacturer lead time concerns (6–12 months), and "one-party" decision-maker objections. CRM Integration: Connect Retail AI to GHL via Make.com (or n8n). Data Mapping: Ensure the agent extracts Name, Phone, Address/Zip, and Service Type to push into correct GHL fields. Calendar Sync: Integrate Cal.com for real-time appointment booking. Rigorous Testing: Conduct "Angry Customer" and "Low Information" simulations to ensure the agent remains professional and stays strictly on-script. Required SkillsVoice Platforms: Proven experience with Retail AI, Retell, or Vapi. Automation: Expert-level knowledge of Make.com or n8n.Technical Integration: Experience working with the GHL API (or similar enterprise CRMs). Prompt Engineering: Ability to write deterministic system prompts that prevent "hallucinations" and maintain control of the conversation. Sales Logic: Understanding of our scripting methodology Required Skills Voice Platforms: Proven experience with Retail AI (preferred), Retell, or Vapi. Automation: Expert-level knowledge of Make.com or n8n. Technical: Experience working with GHL API (or similar enterprise CRMs like LeadPerfection). Prompt Engineering: Ability to write deterministic system prompts that prevent "hallucinations."
